# Splat

> Splat is a lightweight, keyboard-first bug tracker built for indie developers and small studios. Crush bugs faster. Ship more.

Splat helps small teams capture, triage, and resolve software defects with minimal ceremony. It offers a Kanban and table dashboard, real-time updates, severity and category taxonomies, analytics, and a clean dark-mode interface inspired by Linear.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing for Splat.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Email/password or Google authentication to access the app.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public routes.
